---
title: "Z-curve"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-13"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Z-curve demo (p-values computed in R) + teaching printouts
# Includes:
#   1) R-computed p-values (no external calculator)
#   2) Step-by-step conversion table: statistic -> p -> |z|
#   3) z-curve fit + summaries
#   4) Plot with built-in annotations + EFDR (Soric FDR) added
# ============================================================

library(zcurve)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(tibble)
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 1) Helper functions
# ----------------------------

# Convert two-sided p-values to absolute z
z_from_p_two_sided <- function(p) {
  qnorm(1 - p / 2)
}

# Nice printing helper
fmt <- function(x, digits = 4) {
  formatC(x, digits = digits, format = "fg", flag = "#")
}
```


```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 2) Enter extracted data from uploaded sheet
#    Source: uploaded PDF extraction template
# ----------------------------

raw_dat <- tibble(
  study_no = c(
    "1 (ZH)", "2 (ZH)", "3 (ZH)", "4 (ZH)", "5 (ZH)",
    "6 (J)", "7 (J)", "8 (ZH)", "9 (ZH)", "10 (ZH)",
    "11 (SJ)", "12", "13 (ZH)", "14 (SJ)", "15 (SJ)",
    "16 (J)", "17 (SJ)", "18 (SJ)", "19 (J)", "20 (J)",
    "21 (EA)", "22 (ZH)", "23 (J)", "24 (E)", "25 (SJ)",
    "26 (E)", "27 (J)", "28 (ZH)", "29 (E)", "30 (ZH)"
  ),
  exact_p = c(
    0.0001,   # 1
    0.001,    # 2
    0.006,    # 3
    0.0001,   # 4
    0.0001,   # 5
    0.001,    # 6
    1e-6,     # 7
    0.007,    # 8
    0.01,     # 9
    0.0001,   # 10
    0.01,     # 11
    0.0001,   # 12
    0.007,    # 13
    0.001,    # 14
    0.001,    # 15
    0.05,     # 16
    0.001,    # 17
    0.001,    # 18
    NA,       # 19 not use
    0.0003,   # 20
    0.0001,   # 21
    0.001,    # 22
    0.001,    # 23
    0.05,     # 24
    0.005,    # 25
    NA,       # 26 not use
    NA,       # 27 not use
    0.003,    # 28
    1e-5,     # 29
    1e-5      # 30
  )
)

raw_dat
```


```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 3) Clean the data
# ----------------------------
zcurve_dat <- raw_dat %>%
  mutate(
    include = !is.na(exact_p),
    exact_p = as.numeric(exact_p)
  ) %>%
  mice::filter(include) %>%
  mice::filter(exact_p > 0, exact_p <= 1) %>%
  mutate(
    z_abs = z_from_p_two_sided(exact_p)
  )

zcurve_dat
```

```{r}
# Optional: show excluded studies
excluded_dat <- raw_dat %>%
  mice::filter(is.na(exact_p))

cat("\n==============================\n")
cat("Excluded studies (marked not use):\n")
cat("==============================\n\n")
print(excluded_dat, n = nrow(excluded_dat))
```



```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 4) Step-by-step conversion table
# ----------------------------

conversion_table <- zcurve_dat %>%
  transmute(
    study_no = study_no,
    p_value  = exact_p,
    z_abs    = z_abs
  )

conversion_table_pretty <- conversion_table %>%
  mutate(
    p_value = fmt(p_value, 6),
    z_abs   = fmt(z_abs, 4)
  )

cat("\n==============================\n")
cat("Step-by-step conversion table:\n")
cat("Exact p-value -> |z|\n")
cat("==============================\n\n")

print(conversion_table_pretty, n = nrow(conversion_table_pretty))

```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 5) Fit z-curve
# ----------------------------

Z_Scores <- zcurve_dat$z_abs
fit <- zcurve(Z_Scores)

print(summary(fit))
print(summary(fit, all = TRUE))
print(summary(fit, type = "parameters"))
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 6) Print EFDR explicitly
# ----------------------------

sum_all <- summary(fit, all = TRUE)
efdr <- sum_all$coefficients["Soric FDR", ]

cat(sprintf(
  "EFDR = %.3f (95%% CI [%.3f, %.3f])\n",
  efdr["Estimate"], efdr["l.CI"], efdr["u.CI"]
))
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 7) Plot z-curve + annotation
# ----------------------------

sum_basic <- summary(fit)
sum_all   <- summary(fit, all = TRUE)

ODR <- mean(zcurve_dat$exact_p <= 0.05)

EDR  <- sum_basic$coefficients["EDR", c("Estimate", "l.CI", "u.CI")]
ERR  <- sum_basic$coefficients["ERR", c("Estimate", "l.CI", "u.CI")]
EFDR <- sum_all$coefficients["Soric FDR", c("Estimate", "l.CI", "u.CI")]

annot_text <- paste(
  sprintf("Observed discovery rate:\n%.2f", ODR),
  sprintf("Estimated discovery rate:\n%.2f  95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f]",
          EDR[1], EDR[2], EDR[3]),
  sprintf("Expected replicability rate:\n%.2f  95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f]",
          ERR[1], ERR[2], ERR[3]),
  sprintf("Expected false discovery rate:\n%.2f  95%% CI [%.2f, %.2f]",
          EFDR[1], EFDR[2], EFDR[3]),
  sep = "\n\n"
)

plot(
  fit,
  CI = TRUE,
  annotation = FALSE,
  main = "Z-curve from uploaded FFA extraction sheet"
)

usr <- par("usr")
text(
  x = usr[2] - 0.02 * diff(usr[1:2]),
  y = usr[4] - 0.05 * diff(usr[3:4]),
  labels = annot_text,
  adj = c(1, 1),
  cex = 0.85
)
```
